name: argocd-helm
description: ArgoCD and Helm expert skill. Use when deploying applications with ArgoCD, creating or reviewing Helm charts, designing GitOps workflows, managing ApplicationSets, multi-cluster deployments, progressive delivery with Argo Rollouts, troubleshooting sync issues, secrets management (SOPS, External Secrets Operator), and Kubernetes manifest management. Covers ArgoCD 3.x and Helm 3.x best practices.
